Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 01/11/2025
The Indian market has finally shown a very slight sign of hope, indicating a possible improvement after a prolonged quiet period. Source: Best Oasis Limited

MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market has finally shown a very slight sign of hope, indicating a possible
improvement after a prolonged quiet period. dollar has strengthened considerably, limiting any positive impact
this minor shift could have brought.
